electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 142 dB peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, preset [KARA II 70] with LA4X/LA8/LA12X; 137 dB with LA2Xi
electroacoustic.directivity: Horizontal 70 deg or 110 deg symmetric, or 90 deg asymmetric (35/90) via Panflex L-Fins; vertical depends on element count and array curvature
electroacoustic.components: LF: 2 x 8 in neodymium cone drivers (bass-reflex); HF: 1 x 3 in neodymium diaphragm compression driver on DOSC waveguide with Panflex L-Fins

operating_modes: 2-way active (1 enclosure per amplifier output pair: LF + HF)
amplification.per_amplifier_note: Counts are maximum enclosures per amplified controller. LA2Xi yields reduced max SPL/drive capacity vs LA4X/LA8/LA12X.

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point terminal blocks with push-in connection, labeled IN and LINK (daisy-chain); internal pinout 1+/1- = LF, 2+/2- = HF for 2-way active operation
connection.breakouts: Optional connector sealing plate with cable gland for weather-resistant installs; custom 4-point speakON-to-bare-wire cable available for connection to amplified controllers

physical.dimensions_mm: 701 W x 252 H x 409 D (approx; trapezoidal enclosure, dims per datasheet)
physical.cabinet: Premium grade Baltic birch plywood; coated steel grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; rigging components in high-grade anti-corrosion coated steel
physical.finish: Dark grey brown Pantone 426 C, pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

modes: stacked on SB18 IIi or KS21i subwoofers
deployment.max_per_flown_array_note: Stacked configurations: safe limit 6 Kara IIi, maximum limit 9 Kara IIi; on SB18 IIi stack max 9 Kara IIi over 3 SB18 IIi. Flown array element count must be validated in Soundvision.

usage: Long-throw install line source for fixed venues such as performing-arts centers, theaters, opera houses, houses of worship, corporate and exhibition spaces.
Drive each enclosure 2-way active off an L-Acoustics controller: an LA12X powers up to 6, an LA7.16(i) up to 8, an LA4X up to 4, and an LA2Xi up to 4 cabinets.
Pick the preset to match horizontal coverage: KARA II 70, KARA II 90, or KARA II 110, plus KARA II_FI for short-throw flat-response fill (optimized at the 110 setting).
Extend low end with SB18 IIi or KS21i subs in roughly a 3-to-1 ratio; mixed lines couple optimally up to about 9 Kara IIi over 3 SB18 IIi.
Keep stacked counts within the 6-enclosure safe limit (9 maximum) and always confirm array geometry and mechanical safety in Soundvision before rigging.
IP55-rated and color-matchable, so it suits discreet indoor or weather-exposed outdoor installs; do not mix Kara IIi with the touring Kara II / Karai rigging, which is not mechanically compatible.
